note: website Trinity roadmap deep-sync through sprint 5.40: section 14 'What Comes After v0' on sost-trinity.html had a stale tail that stopped at sprint-5.18d (first on-chain payment, block #8512, 2026-05-13) and then jumped straight to v0.5-v1.0 proposed proof-bundle improvements, hiding the entire 5.19-5.40 off-chain stack we shipped after the on-chain narrative closed. This bump adds three new banner-row sub-sections to the roadmap table and 22 SHIPPED rows covering: (A) sprints 5.19-5.32 'autonomy + scientific intake + first real_backend' (5.19 operator loop, 5.20 scientific prompt intake, 5.21-5.22 intake -> task builder bridge + wallet-free sendrawtransaction hotfixes, 5.23 autonomy governor observe-mode, 5.24 operator loop x governor, 5.25 governor watchdog, 5.26 task queue, 5.27 task queue runner, 5.28 queue dashboard, 5.29 scientific intake readers tex/csv/pdf, 5.30 reader metadata in request, 5.31 scientific task classifier no-LLM, 5.32 materials engine real_backend); (B) sprints 5.33-5.36 'result surfacing + materials cache + worker onboarding + dashboard surfacing' (5.33 materials_engine_summary outside hashed bytes, 5.34 materials project cache with per-record sha256 + cache_sha256 + property_hash, 5.35 friendly worker onboarding bundle with payout placeholder pattern that REJECTS real sost1+40hex, 5.36 dashboard cyan materials_cache + workers columns); (C) sprints 5.37-5.40 'external worker trial + autopilot + daily report + release runner' (5.37 trial pack with deterministic expected_compute_output_sha256 ready for cross-host replay equality, 5.38 queue autopilot bounded at max-batches<=24 with seven const-true safety flags, 5.39 daily report markdown-only no HTML no JS, 5.40 sprint release runner read-only git-only seven verbs allowed destructive verbs forbidden at lint). The v0.5/v0.6/v0.7/v0.8/v1.0 'proposed' rows that previously followed 5.18d are kept but explicitly demoted into a separate 'future proof-bundle layer improvements' sub-section with an orange banner row clarifying they are NOT in the 5.19-5.40 off-chain scope and remain a distinct future track focused on the proof-bundle layer itself (--register-preview, multi-bundle index, ECDSA signature over bundle hash, live materials API, first non-fallback campaign). Closing note updated to make the off-chain framing explicit: 'The 5.19-5.40 stack is OFF-CHAIN tooling that wraps the on-chain 5.6-5.18d core; it adds zero new on-chain capability beyond what Sprint 5.18d already shipped.' Pure website edit. Zero src/, zero schemas, zero scripts, zero tests, zero consensus, zero wallet/payment/broadcast changes. Trinity Useful Compute rewards remain POSTPONED (post #133 invariant unchanged). The top summary line in sost-trinity.html ('Status as of Sprint 5.40 ... 48 trinity scripts . 27 strict schemas . 32 docs . 1518 trinity tests PASS') was already set correctly by v265 and is not modified by this bump. sost-explorer.html and trinity-useful-compute.html remain at their v264/v265 state — only the deep roadmap table in sost-trinity.html had drift, which is what v266 closes.
